feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Assam Flood: Kaziranga National Park में 129 Animals की मौत, फिर भी बाढ़ जरूरी? वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Assam Flood: Kaziranga National Park में 129 Animals की मौत, फिर भी बाढ़ जरूरी? वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
As many as 129 animal casualties have been reported in Assam’s Kaziranga National Park and Tiger Reserve due to drowning and other reasons, the state government said on Sunday. The casualties include 14 rhinos, five wild buffaloes, eight wild boars, two swamp deer, 95 hog deer, among others. So far, over 90 people have died in the floods in Assam.Watch video,
पूर्वोत्तर का राज्य असम बाढ़ से सबसे ज्यादा प्रभावित है. असम में बाढ़ और भूस्खलन के कारण अब तक 123 लोगों की जान जा चुकी है. इस बाढ़ से इंसानी जन-जीवन ही नहीं बल्कि जीव-जंतु भी प्रभावित हैं.बता दें कि गोलाघाट स्थित काजीरंगा नेशनल पार्क का 90 फीसदी हिस्सा बाढ़ में डूब गया है. काजीरंगा नेशनल पार्क में अब तक 129 जानवरों की मौत हो चुकी है जबकि 150 से ज्यादा जानवरों को बचाया गया है. देखें वीडियो
#AssamFlood #KazirangaNationalPark
entry.summary: As many as 129 animal casualties have been reported in Assam’s Kaziranga National Park and Tiger Reserve due to drowning and other reasons, the state government said on Sunday. The casualties include 14 rhinos, five wild buffaloes, eight wild boars, two swamp deer, 95 hog deer, among others. So far, over 90 people have died in the floods in Assam.Watch video, पूर्वोत्तर का राज्य असम बाढ़ से सबसे ज्यादा प्रभावित है. असम में बाढ़ और भूस्खलन के कारण अब तक 123 लोगों की जान जा चुकी है. इस बाढ़ से इंसानी जन-जीवन ही नहीं बल्कि जीव-जंतु भी प्रभावित हैं.बता दें कि गोलाघाट स्थित काजीरंगा नेशनल पार्क का 90 फीसदी हिस्सा बाढ़ में डूब गया है. काजीरंगा नेशनल पार्क में अब तक 129 जानवरों की मौत हो चुकी है जबकि 150 से ज्यादा जानवरों को बचाया गया है. देखें वीडियो #AssamFlood #KazirangaNationalPark

entry.title: Adil Rashid stunned Kevin O’Brien with a splendid googly to rattle his stumps वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Adil Rashid stunned Kevin O’Brien with a splendid googly to rattle his stumps वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
England’s Adil Rashid stunned Ireland all-rounder Kevin O’Brien with a splendid googly to rattle his stumps in the second and penultimate ODI.Kevin prepared for the leg-break and lunged forward. However, the ball spun through the bat-pad gap and crashed into the middle stump. Thus, it was a brilliant display of bowling by the 32-year-old leg-spinner.
इंग्लैंड के दाएं हाथ के लेग ब्रेक गेंदबाज आदिल राशिद ने खास कर लिमिटेड ओवर क्रिकेट में कमाल का प्रदर्शन किया है, राशिद ने दूसरे एकदिवसीय मैच में भी ब्रायन का कीमती विकेट लिया, इस मुकाबले में इंग्लैंड की टीम 4 विकेट से जीतने में कामयाब रही। राशिद ने आयरलैंड के बल्लेबाज को आउट करने के लिए गुगली का इस्तेमाल किया। केविन लेग-ब्रेक के लिए खेलने की तैयारी कर रहे थे क्योंकि वह आगे बढ़ गए थे, लेकिन गेंद बल्ले-पैड के बीच से निकली और सीधे मिडिल स्टंप में जा टकराई।
#AdilRashid #KevinO’Brien #Googly
entry.summary: England’s Adil Rashid stunned Ireland all-rounder Kevin O’Brien with a splendid googly to rattle his stumps in the second and penultimate ODI.Kevin prepared for the leg-break and lunged forward. However, the ball spun through the bat-pad gap and crashed into the middle stump. Thus, it was a brilliant display of bowling by the 32-year-old leg-spinner. इंग्लैंड के दाएं हाथ के लेग ब्रेक गेंदबाज आदिल राशिद ने खास कर लिमिटेड ओवर क्रिकेट में कमाल का प्रदर्शन किया है, राशिद ने दूसरे एकदिवसीय मैच में भी ब्रायन का कीमती विकेट लिया, इस मुकाबले में इंग्लैंड की टीम 4 विकेट से जीतने में कामयाब रही। राशिद ने आयरलैंड के बल्लेबाज को आउट करने के लिए गुगली का इस्तेमाल किया। केविन लेग-ब्रेक के लिए खेलने की तैयारी कर रहे थे क्योंकि वह आगे बढ़ गए थे, लेकिन गेंद बल्ले-पैड के बीच से निकली और सीधे मिडिल स्टंप में जा टकराई। #AdilRashid #KevinO’Brien #Googly

entry.title: FALSE: Michael V’s poem supports Sara Duterte in 2022 elections

link.title: FALSE: Michael V’s poem supports Sara Duterte in 2022 elections

entry.content:
A graphic posted on Facebook group ‘SARA DU30 Supporters for 2022’ features an image of comedian Michael V and a poem written by him. It also includes the words ‘I stand with the president. The claim of the graphic is FALSE.
Read:
entry.summary: A graphic posted on Facebook group ‘SARA DU30 Supporters for 2022’ features an image of comedian Michael V and a poem written by him. It also includes the words ‘I stand with the president. The claim of the graphic is FALSE. Read:

entry.title: Operasi Yustisi Pemakaian Masker di Pasar dan Mall Kota Semarang

link.title: Operasi Yustisi Pemakaian Masker di Pasar dan Mall Kota Semarang

entry.content:
SEMARANG, KOMPAS.TV - Petugas dari Satuan Polisi Pamong Praja, Kota Semarang, menyisir beberapa ruang publik seperti pasar tradisional, pasar swalayan dan mall, untuk melakukan operasi yustisi pemakaian masker. Petugas menggelar operasi yustisi tersebut, agar warga berdisiplin dalam menjalankan protokol kesehatan.
Operasi yustisi pemakaian masker dilakukan di sejumlah tempat publik yang berpotensi menimbulkan kerumunan. Sejumlah warga yang tidak memakai masker di ruang publik, mendapat teguran ringan berupa push up, dan menghafal Pancasila. Hal tersebut dikarenakan masker saat ini menjadi salah satu pelindung utama ketika berada di ruang publik.
Razia sengaja digelar di ruang publik karena masih banyak warga yang belum sadar untuk memakai masker selama berada di luar rumah. Kesadaran warga menerapkan protokol kesehatan memang sangat dibutuhkan. Selama operadi berlangsung, petugas Satpol PP Kota Semarang menyediakan 400 masker untuk dibagikan kepada warga yang tidak memakai masker.
#OperasiYustisi #Masker #ProtokolKesehatan
entry.summary: SEMARANG, KOMPAS.TV - Petugas dari Satuan Polisi Pamong Praja, Kota Semarang, menyisir beberapa ruang publik seperti pasar tradisional, pasar swalayan dan mall, untuk melakukan operasi yustisi pemakaian masker. Petugas menggelar operasi yustisi tersebut, agar warga berdisiplin dalam menjalankan protokol kesehatan. Operasi yustisi pemakaian masker dilakukan di sejumlah tempat publik yang berpotensi menimbulkan kerumunan. Sejumlah warga yang tidak memakai masker di ruang publik, mendapat teguran ringan berupa push up, dan menghafal Pancasila. Hal tersebut dikarenakan masker saat ini menjadi salah satu pelindung utama ketika berada di ruang publik. Razia sengaja digelar di ruang publik karena masih banyak warga yang belum sadar untuk memakai masker selama berada di luar rumah. Kesadaran warga menerapkan protokol kesehatan memang sangat dibutuhkan. Selama operadi berlangsung, petugas Satpol PP Kota Semarang menyediakan 400 masker untuk dibagikan kepada warga yang tidak memakai masker. #OperasiYustisi #Masker #ProtokolKesehatan

entry.title: Jenglot Hello Kitty Tiba-tiba Trending! Emangnya Apaan Sih?

link.title: Jenglot Hello Kitty Tiba-tiba Trending! Emangnya Apaan Sih?

entry.content: VIVA – Tiba-tiba keyword jenglot Hello Kitty trending di media sosial. Ternyata ini adalah imbas kelakuan iseng seorang YouTuber, Gila Eksperimen, di akun miliknya. Seketika menjadi viral karena memang bikin geleng-geleng kepala.
entry.summary: VIVA – Tiba-tiba keyword jenglot Hello Kitty trending di media sosial. Ternyata ini adalah imbas kelakuan iseng seorang YouTuber, Gila Eksperimen, di akun miliknya. Seketika menjadi viral karena memang bikin geleng-geleng kepala.

entry.title: ప్రజా వాగ్గేయకారుడు వంగపండు మృతికి CM Jagan సహా సంతాపాన్ని తెలిపిన పలువురు రాజకీయ ప్రముఖులు !

link.title: ప్రజా వాగ్గేయకారుడు వంగపండు మృతికి CM Jagan సహా సంతాపాన్ని తెలిపిన పలువురు రాజకీయ ప్రముఖులు !

entry.content:
Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh YS Jagan Mohan Reddy condolences to Telugu revolutionary Poet Vangapandu Prasada Rao, who passed away on early morning of Tuesday. YSRCP MP Vijayasai Reddy and some Ministers also condolences to Vangapandu.
#VangapanduPrasadRao
#VangapanduPrasadRaoIsNoMore
#Vangapandu
#APCMJagan
#VijayasaiReddy
#TeluguPoet
#botsasatyanarayana
#AndhraPraadesh
రాష్ట్రానికి చెందిన ప్రముఖ వాగ్గేయకారుడు వంగపండు ప్రసాదరావు కన్నుమూశారు. ఆయన వయస్సు 78 సంవత్సరాలు. కొంతకాలంగా ఆయన అనారోగ్యంతో బాధపడుతున్నారు. అదే సమయంలో గుండెపోటుకు గురయ్యారు. ఈ తెల్లవారు జామున విజయనగరం జిల్లా పార్వతీపురంలోని తన నివాసంలో తుదిశ్వాస విడిచారు.
entry.summary: Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh YS Jagan Mohan Reddy condolences to Telugu revolutionary Poet Vangapandu Prasada Rao, who passed away on early morning of Tuesday. YSRCP MP Vijayasai Reddy and some Ministers also condolences to Vangapandu. #VangapanduPrasadRao #VangapanduPrasadRaoIsNoMore #Vangapandu #APCMJagan #VijayasaiReddy #TeluguPoet #botsasatyanarayana #AndhraPraadesh రాష్ట్రానికి చెందిన ప్రముఖ వాగ్గేయకారుడు వంగపండు ప్రసాదరావు కన్నుమూశారు. ఆయన వయస్సు 78 సంవత్సరాలు. కొంతకాలంగా ఆయన అనారోగ్యంతో బాధపడుతున్నారు. అదే సమయంలో గుండెపోటుకు గురయ్యారు. ఈ తెల్లవారు జామున విజయనగరం జిల్లా పార్వతీపురంలోని తన నివాసంలో తుదిశ్వాస విడిచారు.

As one of the longest-standing Hip Hop websites, DX not only stays current on Hip Hop culture, but continues to influence it, encourage it, and simultaneously reflect on its past. entry.title: Futebol de Verdade #191 - Os ataques ao mercado e Tiago no Minho

link.title: Futebol de Verdade #191 - Os ataques ao mercado e Tiago no Minho

entry.content: Bom dia! Hoje, no Futebol de Verdade, vou falar do ataque ao mercado dos grandes e do anúncio de Tiago Mendes como novo treinador do Vitória SC. Se quiser, pode deixar perguntas na caixa de comentários, que elas serão submetidas a concurso para virem a ser respondidas no Q&A de sábado. Força!
entry.summary: Bom dia! Hoje, no Futebol de Verdade, vou falar do ataque ao mercado dos grandes e do anúncio de Tiago Mendes como novo treinador do Vitória SC. Se quiser, pode deixar perguntas na caixa de comentários, que elas serão submetidas a concurso para virem a ser respondidas no Q&A de sábado. Força!

entry.title: Mahasiswa Gelar Lomba Video Tutorial Kerajinan Daur Ulang Sampah, Ajak Berkarya Di Masa Pandemi

link.title: Mahasiswa Gelar Lomba Video Tutorial Kerajinan Daur Ulang Sampah, Ajak Berkarya Di Masa Pandemi

entry.content:
BANJARMASIN, KOMPAS.TV - Lomba Video Tutorial Kerajinan Tangan Daur Ulang Sampah Se-Kalimantan Selatan (Kalsel) digelar UKM Koperasi Mahasiswa (Kopma) Universitas Islam Kalimantan (Uniska) dalam rangka Hari Lingkungan Hidup se-dunia, Senin (27/7/2020).
Kegiatan yang sebelumnya direncanakan secara langsung diubah menjadi lomba virtual menyesuaikan pandemi covid-19.
Menurut Ketua Pelaksana Kegiatan, M Yanuar Ridhani, kegiatan lomba dilakukan dengan mengirimkam video tutorial kerajinan tangan pengolahan daur ulang sampah menjadi barang bernilai seni atau barang bernilai guna.
Penyerahan hadiahpun dilakukan di halaman kampus senin pagi dihadiri para juara.
"Hari ini kami mengumumkan siapa pemenangnya dan sekaligus penutupan kegiatan. Kegiatan ini sudah dijalankan sejak awal Juni lalu dan 27 Juli ini pengumuman hasil. Adapun ini diikuti 21 peserta dari Kalsel," katanya.
Sementara, Ketua Umum Kopma Uniska, Nurhadi, mengatakan, kerjasama tim, meski ditengah pandemi pihaknya tetap bisa menjalankan kegiatan dengan tetap menerapkan protokol kesehatan.
Lomba tersebut merupakan agenda program kerja tahun ini. Ia berharap kegiatan ini dapat mendorong kreatifitas masyarakat untuk memberdayakan diri selama pandemic dan berdiam di rumah dengan memanfaatkan limbah sampah.
Video-video tutorial yang berhasil dibuatpun diharapkan menjadi inspirasi bagi penontonnya untuk terus produktif selama pandemi.
Kepala Biro Kemahasiswaan Uniska MAB, Budi Setiadi mengapresiasi kegiatan Unit Kegiatan Mahasiswa di Uniska.
Edukasi ke masyarakat tentang pemanfaatan sampah itu merupakan langkah yang sejalan dengan kampus daripada Tri Dharma Pendidikan Perguruan Tinggi.
"Saya sangat mendukung, mudahan ini bisa dikembangkan lagi hingga kegiatan yang berskala besar," Ucapnya.
Ditengah pandemi ini, sudah sepatutnya tidak menghentikan kreatifitas mahasiswa termasuk dalam menggelar kegiatan yang diharapkan bermanfaat banyak dalam menggerakkan roda ekonomi masyarakat.
entry.summary: BANJARMASIN, KOMPAS.TV - Lomba Video Tutorial Kerajinan Tangan Daur Ulang Sampah Se-Kalimantan Selatan (Kalsel) digelar UKM Koperasi Mahasiswa (Kopma) Universitas Islam Kalimantan (Uniska) dalam rangka Hari Lingkungan Hidup se-dunia, Senin (27/7/2020). Kegiatan yang sebelumnya direncanakan secara langsung diubah menjadi lomba virtual menyesuaikan pandemi covid-19. Menurut Ketua Pelaksana Kegiatan, M Yanuar Ridhani, kegiatan lomba dilakukan dengan mengirimkam video tutorial kerajinan tangan pengolahan daur ulang sampah menjadi barang bernilai seni atau barang bernilai guna. Penyerahan hadiahpun dilakukan di halaman kampus senin pagi dihadiri para juara. "Hari ini kami mengumumkan siapa pemenangnya dan sekaligus penutupan kegiatan. Kegiatan ini sudah dijalankan sejak awal Juni lalu dan 27 Juli ini pengumuman hasil. Adapun ini diikuti 21 peserta dari Kalsel," katanya. Sementara, Ketua Umum Kopma Uniska, Nurhadi, mengatakan, kerjasama tim, meski ditengah pandemi pihaknya tetap bisa menjalankan kegiatan dengan tetap menerapkan protokol kesehatan. Lomba tersebut merupakan agenda program kerja tahun ini. Ia berharap kegiatan ini dapat mendorong kreatifitas masyarakat untuk memberdayakan diri selama pandemic dan berdiam di rumah dengan memanfaatkan limbah sampah. Video-video tutorial yang berhasil dibuatpun diharapkan menjadi inspirasi bagi penontonnya untuk terus produktif selama pandemi. Kepala Biro Kemahasiswaan Uniska MAB, Budi Setiadi mengapresiasi kegiatan Unit Kegiatan Mahasiswa di Uniska. Edukasi ke masyarakat tentang pemanfaatan sampah itu merupakan langkah yang sejalan dengan kampus daripada Tri Dharma Pendidikan Perguruan Tinggi. "Saya sangat mendukung, mudahan ini bisa dikembangkan lagi hingga kegiatan yang berskala besar," Ucapnya. Ditengah pandemi ini, sudah sepatutnya tidak menghentikan kreatifitas mahasiswa termasuk dalam menggelar kegiatan yang diharapkan bermanfaat banyak dalam menggerakkan roda ekonomi masyarakat.

entry.title: IPL 2020 : Rishabh Pant has smashed most runs & Most Sixes in last three IPL Season Oneindia Sports

link.title: IPL 2020 : Rishabh Pant has smashed most runs & Most Sixes in last three IPL Season Oneindia Sports

entry.content:
Rishabh Pant is one of the best wicket-keeper batsman in the world cricket right now. Rishabh pant has lots of talent and he has peformed well in Shorter format of the game in Indian Premier League. Do You Know, This Southpaw batsman has smashes most runs and most sixes in the last three IPL Season, even more than Virat Kohli and David Warner. This time, UAE is hosting IPL Season 13 and pant is confident to score most runs in the T20 League.
Rishabh Pant, Rishabh Pant IPL, Rishabh Pant Sixes, Rishabh Pant most sixes, Rishabh Pant most runs, Rishabh Pant IPL 2018, Rishabh Pant IPL 2020, IPL 2020 Schedule, IPL 2020 calender, Virat Kohli, Delhi Capitals, IPL time table, IPL match UAE, IPL UAE 2020, oneindia Sports, David Warner, Chris Gayle, Shikhar Dhawan, MS Dhoni
#IPL2020 #ViratKohli #RishabhPant
entry.summary: Rishabh Pant is one of the best wicket-keeper batsman in the world cricket right now. Rishabh pant has lots of talent and he has peformed well in Shorter format of the game in Indian Premier League. Do You Know, This Southpaw batsman has smashes most runs and most sixes in the last three IPL Season, even more than Virat Kohli and David Warner. This time, UAE is hosting IPL Season 13 and pant is confident to score most runs in the T20 League. Rishabh Pant, Rishabh Pant IPL, Rishabh Pant Sixes, Rishabh Pant most sixes, Rishabh Pant most runs, Rishabh Pant IPL 2018, Rishabh Pant IPL 2020, IPL 2020 Schedule, IPL 2020 calender, Virat Kohli, Delhi Capitals, IPL time table, IPL match UAE, IPL UAE 2020, oneindia Sports, David Warner, Chris Gayle, Shikhar Dhawan, MS Dhoni #IPL2020 #ViratKohli #RishabhPant

entry.title: Emmy nominees are pretty diverse, but not everyone is happy - CNN - 1BreakingNews.com

link.title: Emmy nominees are pretty diverse, but not everyone is happy - CNN - 1BreakingNews.com

entry.content:
Emmy nominees are pretty diverse, but not everyone is happy - CNN 1BreakingNews.com
In a year that has seen renewed calls for inclusion, the Emmy Awards delivered more diversity among the nominees announced Tuesday.
Copyright cnn.com
entry.summary: Emmy nominees are pretty diverse, but not everyone is happy - CNN 1BreakingNews.com In a year that has seen renewed calls for inclusion, the Emmy Awards delivered more diversity among the nominees announced Tuesday. Copyright cnn.com

entry.title: Ensauvagement? Darmanin sermonné par sa propre majorité

link.title: Ensauvagement? Darmanin sermonné par sa propre majorité

entry.content:
Barbara Pompili n’est désormais plus la seule figure de la majorité à reprocher à Gérald Darmanin l’emploi du terme “ensauvagement”. Si la ministre de la Transition écologique avait pris soin d’accuser indirectement son collègue de l’Intérieur de “monter les Français les uns contre les autres”, deux députés LREM s’en sont pris frontalement aux propos tenus récemment par Gérald Darmanin.
—–
Abonnez-vous à la chaîne YouTube du HuffPost dès maintenant :
Pour plus de contenu du HuffPost:
Web:
Facebook:
Twitter:
Instagram:
Pour recevoir gratuitement notre newsletter quotidienne:
entry.summary: Barbara Pompili n’est désormais plus la seule figure de la majorité à reprocher à Gérald Darmanin l’emploi du terme “ensauvagement”. Si la ministre de la Transition écologique avait pris soin d’accuser indirectement son collègue de l’Intérieur de “monter les Français les uns contre les autres”, deux députés LREM s’en sont pris frontalement aux propos tenus récemment par Gérald Darmanin. —– Abonnez-vous à la chaîne YouTube du HuffPost dès maintenant : Pour plus de contenu du HuffPost: Web: Facebook: Twitter: Instagram: Pour recevoir gratuitement notre newsletter quotidienne:

entry.title: Ram Temple Bhumi Pujan: ये है Ayodhya में PM Modi का पूरा मिनट-टू-मिनट कार्यक्रम वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Ram Temple Bhumi Pujan: ये है Ayodhya में PM Modi का पूरा मिनट-टू-मिनट कार्यक्रम वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Ayodhya is all geared up for the historic event of the bhumi pujan ceremony to mark the beginning of the construction of Ram Mandir in Ayodhya. According to the itinerary of Prime Minister Modi’s programme for August 5, he will be flying for Lucknow around 9.30 am on a special jet. After landing in Lucknow, PM Modi will take a chopper to Ayodhya. Watch video,
राम की नगरी अयोध्या पूरी तरह सजकर तैयार है. क्योंकि 5 अगस्त को अयोध्या में भूमि पूजन होना है. प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी बुधवार को राम मंदिर भूमि पूजन कार्यक्रम में हिस्सा लेने अयोध्या पहुंचेंगे. राम की नगरी इस ऐतिहासिक मौके के लिए सज कर तैयार है, सारी सजावट और भूमि पूजन की तैयारियां पूरी की जा चुकी हैं. सुरक्षा का खास प्रबंध किया गया है. जानिए अयोध्या में पीएम मोदी का मिनट टू मिनट कार्यक्रम.
#RamTempleBhumiPujan #PMModi #Ayodhya
entry.summary: Ayodhya is all geared up for the historic event of the bhumi pujan ceremony to mark the beginning of the construction of Ram Mandir in Ayodhya. According to the itinerary of Prime Minister Modi’s programme for August 5, he will be flying for Lucknow around 9.30 am on a special jet. After landing in Lucknow, PM Modi will take a chopper to Ayodhya. Watch video, राम की नगरी अयोध्या पूरी तरह सजकर तैयार है. क्योंकि 5 अगस्त को अयोध्या में भूमि पूजन होना है. प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी बुधवार को राम मंदिर भूमि पूजन कार्यक्रम में हिस्सा लेने अयोध्या पहुंचेंगे. राम की नगरी इस ऐतिहासिक मौके के लिए सज कर तैयार है, सारी सजावट और भूमि पूजन की तैयारियां पूरी की जा चुकी हैं. सुरक्षा का खास प्रबंध किया गया है. जानिए अयोध्या में पीएम मोदी का मिनट टू मिनट कार्यक्रम. #RamTempleBhumiPujan #PMModi #Ayodhya

entry.title: Good samaritan rescues goat with head stuck in fence in Georgia, US

link.title: Good samaritan rescues goat with head stuck in fence in Georgia, US

entry.content:
A good samaritan in Kingston, Georgia rescued a goat who got its head stuck in a fence.
Footage shows amateur animal rescuer, Joe, release the animal’s head from the fence where it promptly runs off.
Joe told Newsflare: "Me and my fiancé were driving down a backroad and we were late to our horse back riding session, we saw this little goat had his head stuck in the fence line.
"We reversed and I jumped out to see if I could get his head pulled out of the fence.
"He was hesitant at first but then he understood and let me pop his head out.
"He gave a happy little hop as he was freed!"
This footage was filmed on July 18.
entry.summary: A good samaritan in Kingston, Georgia rescued a goat who got its head stuck in a fence. Footage shows amateur animal rescuer, Joe, release the animal’s head from the fence where it promptly runs off. Joe told Newsflare: "Me and my fiancé were driving down a backroad and we were late to our horse back riding session, we saw this little goat had his head stuck in the fence line. "We reversed and I jumped out to see if I could get his head pulled out of the fence. "He was hesitant at first but then he understood and let me pop his head out. "He gave a happy little hop as he was freed!" This footage was filmed on July 18.

entry.title: Harry et Meghan Markle : un retour dans la famille royale impossible ?

link.title: Harry et Meghan Markle : un retour dans la famille royale impossible ?

entry.content: Le 11 août prochain, la biographie tant attendue concernant le prince Harry et Meghan Markle, Finding Freedom sortira dans les libraires. Cette dernière risque de signer officiellement leur sortie de la famille Royale, avec aucun retour possible selon le Daily Mail.
entry.summary: Le 11 août prochain, la biographie tant attendue concernant le prince Harry et Meghan Markle, Finding Freedom sortira dans les libraires. Cette dernière risque de signer officiellement leur sortie de la famille Royale, avec aucun retour possible selon le Daily Mail.

entry.title: Violences conjugales : une plateforme pour briser le silence

link.title: Violences conjugales : une plateforme pour briser le silence

entry.content:
Le quarantième féminicide de l’année en France a eu lieu près de Lyon, mardi 28 juillet. Comment enrayer le fléau des violences conjugales ? Depuis plus d’un an et demi, une plateforme permet aux victimes de contacter directement des policiers spécialement formés. Cet outil numérique a déjà sauvé des vies.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Le quarantième féminicide de l’année en France a eu lieu près de Lyon, mardi 28 juillet. Comment enrayer le fléau des violences conjugales ? Depuis plus d’un an et demi, une plateforme permet aux victimes de contacter directement des policiers spécialement formés. Cet outil numérique a déjà sauvé des vies. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.content: Dopo gli ultimi 250 arrivi, all’hotspot isolano ci sono circa 950 persone, a fronte di una capienza di 95View on euronews

entry.title: Vaksin Sinovac Mulai Diaktifkan Bulan Agustus

link.title: Vaksin Sinovac Mulai Diaktifkan Bulan Agustus

entry.content:
Setelah sampai di Kota Bandung usai di kirim dari Tiongkok, uji klinis vaksin Sinovac yang dianggap mampu untuk menangkal virus korona sudah memasuki tahap akhir penelitian, rencananya uji klinis vaksin penangkal covid 19 ini mulai akan di ujicobakan langsung awal agustus mendatang.
Harapan hadirnya vaksin corona mendapatkan titik terang.
Biofarma, perusahaan farmasi asal Indonesia yang berada di Kota Bandung saat ini, sedang melakukan tahap uji vaksin yang dihadirkan langsung dari Tiongkok bernama sinovac.
Rencanannya vaksin ini jika telah selesai melalui rangkaian proses di Biofarma akan di uji kliniskan terhadap sejumlah relawan pada awal agustus mendatang.
Uji klinis vaksin sinovak ini merupakan tahap ketiga yang sebelumnya sudah melewati dua fase proses uji dan akan dilakukan monitoring selama enam bulan.
Jika uji klinis vaksin ini berhasil rencananya tahun 2021 Biofarma siap memproduksi vaksin tersebut dalam jumlah masal bagi warga Indonesia.
Biofarma mempunyai kapasitas produksi hingga 2 milyar pertahun untuk semua jenis vaksin.
Khusus untuk vaksin covid -19 jika berhasil, akan diberikan kapasitas 100 juta pada tahap awal dan tahap berikutnya akan dioptimalkan sampai 250 juta dosis vaksin.
Untuk lebih tahu berita ter-update seputar Jawa Barat, bisa klink link di bawah .
IG :
Youtube :
Twitter :
Facebook :
entry.summary: Setelah sampai di Kota Bandung usai di kirim dari Tiongkok, uji klinis vaksin Sinovac yang dianggap mampu untuk menangkal virus korona sudah memasuki tahap akhir penelitian, rencananya uji klinis vaksin penangkal covid 19 ini mulai akan di ujicobakan langsung awal agustus mendatang. Harapan hadirnya vaksin corona mendapatkan titik terang. Biofarma, perusahaan farmasi asal Indonesia yang berada di Kota Bandung saat ini, sedang melakukan tahap uji vaksin yang dihadirkan langsung dari Tiongkok bernama sinovac. Rencanannya vaksin ini jika telah selesai melalui rangkaian proses di Biofarma akan di uji kliniskan terhadap sejumlah relawan pada awal agustus mendatang. Uji klinis vaksin sinovak ini merupakan tahap ketiga yang sebelumnya sudah melewati dua fase proses uji dan akan dilakukan monitoring selama enam bulan. Jika uji klinis vaksin ini berhasil rencananya tahun 2021 Biofarma siap memproduksi vaksin tersebut dalam jumlah masal bagi warga Indonesia. Biofarma mempunyai kapasitas produksi hingga 2 milyar pertahun untuk semua jenis vaksin. Khusus untuk vaksin covid -19 jika berhasil, akan diberikan kapasitas 100 juta pada tahap awal dan tahap berikutnya akan dioptimalkan sampai 250 juta dosis vaksin. Untuk lebih tahu berita ter-update seputar Jawa Barat, bisa klink link di bawah . IG : Youtube : Twitter : Facebook :

entry.title: Umbrella Academy- What The Characters Should Have Looked Like

link.title: Umbrella Academy- What The Characters Should Have Looked Like

entry.content:
How These Umbrella Academy Characters Almost Looked
Subscribe:
When My Chemical Romance frontman, Gerard Way, conceived of Umbrella Academy he probably never foresaw it’s future popularity.
Okay, so maybe he knew it would be a hit at Dark Horse Comics, but there’s no way he could see it becoming a hit Netflix original series. Which brings us to the point of this video. Yes, you’re here to learn all about the difference in the characters from the comic book personas to their streaming debut. It’s all so exciting, isn’t it?
You’re about to hear all about the famous Hargreeves children like Luther, Klaus, Diego, Ben, Vanya, Allison, and Number Five. However, there’s way more in this jam-packed video about all the characters you want to know about it. We even get to massively changed characters like The Conductor and The Handler. Plus, we even mention Cha-Cha and Hazel, because who could forget those two lovable side villains.
No character was safe from our critical lens. Trust us, you’ll find plenty of surprises in this one.
You’re never going to see Klaus the same way after seeing this list, but honestly, the same could be said for every member of the Umbrella Academy. The casting team took a lot of creative liberties on this one you guys.
Comic books are a special form of media that tend to be difficult to faithfully adapt. It appears Umbrella Academy is no different, but it’s time for you to decide.
Sit back, click play, and enjoy another all-time video from The Binger!
Our Social Media:
Facebook:
Written By: D. McCondichie
Narrated By: J. Delaney
Edited By: E. Garcia
entry.summary: How These Umbrella Academy Characters Almost Looked Subscribe: When My Chemical Romance frontman, Gerard Way, conceived of Umbrella Academy he probably never foresaw it’s future popularity. Okay, so maybe he knew it would be a hit at Dark Horse Comics, but there’s no way he could see it becoming a hit Netflix original series. Which brings us to the point of this video. Yes, you’re here to learn all about the difference in the characters from the comic book personas to their streaming debut. It’s all so exciting, isn’t it? You’re about to hear all about the famous Hargreeves children like Luther, Klaus, Diego, Ben, Vanya, Allison, and Number Five. However, there’s way more in this jam-packed video about all the characters you want to know about it. We even get to massively changed characters like The Conductor and The Handler. Plus, we even mention Cha-Cha and Hazel, because who could forget those two lovable side villains. No character was safe from our critical lens. Trust us, you’ll find plenty of surprises in this one. You’re never going to see Klaus the same way after seeing this list, but honestly, the same could be said for every member of the Umbrella Academy. The casting team took a lot of creative liberties on this one you guys. Comic books are a special form of media that tend to be difficult to faithfully adapt. It appears Umbrella Academy is no different, but it’s time for you to decide. Sit back, click play, and enjoy another all-time video from The Binger! Our Social Media: Facebook: Written By: D. McCondichie Narrated By: J. Delaney Edited By: E. Garcia
